title_guess: Oakington / Cambridge: William & Bryony MA graduation weekend

pages.text:
Early April 2007 Simon drove to [?Impley] & back.

__May 11th Friday__ Simon, Eve & Tonie set off at 6.20. for William's & Bryony's MA Graduation weekend. It's cold & rainy.

We reached Oakington at 8.30. Just before the village was the refugee camp, surrounded by barbed wire. Just after the village was our camp site, small & sheltered. A miserable woman came out of her wood cabin to make sure we weren't on her grass.

Rosie at school

__Saturday__
At 9.20. we called on Jane & Robert, Robert was in his dressing gown, Jane in bed asleep. We had coffee & chatted. We met William at the Fisher Building at St. John's. The degree ceremony was delayed so we had coffee at Heffer's Book Shop. We enjoyed the degree ceremony. Then William returned his fancy gown & we lunched at the Grad Pad. We shopped & I bought shoes & a hand bag. We met up with Bryony & John & Tess & had a cup of tea underground. Then William & Tess went back to the house & the rest of us went to Evensong at Kings & heard one of Bryony's favourite anthems. It rained off & on all day.
